Thanks for contributing to DuxxDB! Please fill this in so reviewers have context.

## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link the issue it closes. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] ✨ Feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change
- [ ] 📚 Docs / chore / CI
- [ ] ⚡ Performance

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Did not regress `cargo bench -p duxx-bench` by > 5% (if perf-relevant)
- [ ] Updated docs (`docs/`, README) if behavior or surface changed
- [ ] Conventional-commit style (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything specific to look at, trade-offs made, follow-ups deferred. -->
